# veeam_backup_jobs (Data Source)

Data source for fetching backup jobs from Veeam. Can fetch all jobs or a specific job by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `job_id` (String) ID of a specific backup job to fetch
- `job_name` (String) Name of a specific backup job to fetch

### Read-Only

- `backup_jobs` (Attributes List) List of backup jobs (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backup_jobs))
- `id` (String) Data source identifier

<a id="nestedatt--backup_jobs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backup_jobs`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `description` (String) Description of the backup job
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the backup job is enabled
- `id` (String) Backup job identifier
- `job_type` (String) Type of the backup job
- `name` (String) Name of the backup job
- `repository` (String) Repository used by the backup job
- `schedule` (String) Schedule of the backup job
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp
